name: Kentucky Ham'n' Angel Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry yeast and 1 tablespoon of baking soda.
2. Gradually add in the buttermilk while stirring until combined.
3. Stir in the sugar until well incorporated.
4. Fold in the cooked country ham until evenly distributed throughout the dough.
5. Shape the mixture into a biscuit shape and place on a greased baking sheet.
6. Let rise for 1 hour at room temperature before baking.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
